---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in brain
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `brain ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 24.04]
- brain version: [e.g., v0.2.14 or commit hash — `brain --version`]
- LLM backend: [e.g., Anthropic API, Ollama llama3.1, Claude CLI]
- Go version (if building from source): [e.g., 1.24.2]

## Additional Context
Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
